name: Berrybank Wind Farm
notable: Stage 1: 43x Vestas V136-4.2MW (180.6MW). Stage 2: 37x Vestas V136-4.2MW (100.5MW). Owned by GPG/Naturgy.

timeline.title: VREAS auction winner
timeline.detail: Selected as winner of Victorian Renewable Energy Auction Scheme

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Site works began for Stage 1 and Stage 2

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Berrybank Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DELWP EES)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 112 m hub for V136-4.2 on Western VIC gentle terrain
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Berrybank/Rokewood, Western Victoria
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP with ERA5 long-term correction; P50 net yield
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (AusNet Services), near Ararat VIC
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~20 km of 220 kV to Bulgana 220 kV substation — same AusNet connection point as Bulgana Green Power Hub and Golden Plains.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: Bulgana substation augmented by AusNet to accommodate multiple large wind farms in the Western Victoria Wind Farm Zone.
eis_specs.notes: 281 MW (67 x 4.2 MW Vestas V136), near Rokewood/Inverleigh, Western Victoria. Part of the Western Victoria Wind Farm Zone alongside Golden Plains and Bulgana. VIC EES approved 2019. Now operating. Connects to Bulgana substation — shared 220 kV hub for multiple Western VIC wind farms.
